description: Native English (American). Male, late 50s. High quality, warm intimate studio tone. Persona: approving senior mentor. Emotion: warm, proud, quietly delighted. A low, smooth, resonant voice with unhurried encouraging warmth, the sound of an older expert who recognizes rare talent and takes quiet pleasure in naming it; close, certain, kind.
text: [warm] There it is. That's it. [proud] I have watched a great many people sit where you are sitting, and not one of them is quite like you. You have it. You have always had it.
